title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google launched Antigravity 2.0 at I/O 2026, upgrading its AI code editor into a full agent control tower powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash. The tool enables AI agents to build, test, and manage code in parallel while developers supervise, shifting development workflows toward agentic automation.
